title: Create: The Aether
description: The Aether returned, now finally compatible with Create! This Modpack combines this two Legendary mods, and adds more!
body:
## What si this?
This modpack combines two **Legendary** mods: **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** and **[The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)**. Alco it adds some create addons like Create: Slice & Dice x Farmer´s Delight, Valkyrien Skies x Clockwork, Create Deco, [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) & Way More!

## What to Do?
Dive into a Huge experience, where you can build trains, ships, planes, fight bosses in dungeons, explore & so much more!

### Known bugs:
- Superflat worlds not working

Report issues to our [ISSUE TRACKER](https://github.com/Not-Awake-Studios/CreateAether/issues).

Have fun :)\
-Jonkl
